shows_call.apply_application_data_help: Fills in the accommodation need and appends to the organizer notes the artist's accommodation preferences and departure city from the application.
shows_call.apply_application_data_label: Also import information from the application
shows_call.confirm_accept_desc: Do you want to accept the application "{title}"? The artist will be notified of your decision.
shows_call.confirm_import_performer_desc: Do you want to import {name} as an artist of the edition?
shows_call.confirm_import_performer_with_show_desc: Do you want to import {name} as an artist of the edition? They will also be linked to the show associated with this application.
shows_call.confirm_link_performer_to_show_desc: {name} is already an artist of the edition. Do you want to link them to the show associated with this application?
shows_call.confirm_pending_desc: Do you want to set the application « {title} » back to pending? The artist will be notified of your decision.
shows_call.confirm_reject_desc: Do you want to reject the application "{title}"? The artist will be notified of your decision.
shows_call.create_first: Create the first call for shows
shows_call.delete_confirm_message: This action will permanently delete the call "{name}" and all associated applications.
shows_call.description_help: Describe the call for shows: type of shows sought, conditions, etc.
shows_call.description_placeholder: Describe the shows you are looking for this edition...
shows_call.external_url_description: Artists will be redirected to this link to apply
shows_call.field_accommodation_desc: Ask if the artist needs accommodation
shows_call.field_departure_city_desc: Ask for departure city for travel allowance calculation
shows_call.field_portfolio_desc: Ask for a link to the artist's portfolio or website
shows_call.field_require_phone_desc: When disabled, the phone number (main contact and additional performers) becomes optional in the application form
shows_call.field_social_links_desc: Ask for links to the artist's social networks
shows_call.field_stage_setup_desc: Ask for the act's stage setup (setup before and state of the stage afterwards)
shows_call.field_technical_desc: Ask for the show's technical requirements
shows_call.field_video_desc: Ask for a link to a show video
shows_call.form_fields_description: Select optional fields to include in the application form
shows_call.mode_description: Choose how to manage applications for this edition
shows_call.name_placeholder: E.g.: Open stage, Gala, Street shows...
shows_call.no_applications_desc: No applications have been received for this call for shows yet
shows_call.no_calls_desc: Create a call for shows to receive applications from artists
shows_call.search_placeholder: Search by artist name or show title...
shows_call.view_applications_desc: View and process received show applications
shows_call.visibility_closed_desc: The call does not accept applications
shows_call.visibility_description: Define who can see and access this show call
shows_call.visibility_offline_desc: Invisible everywhere, does not appear on any public page
shows_call.visibility_private_desc: Accessible only via a direct link
shows_call.visibility_public_desc: Visible to everyone and listed on the platform
